name: Oriental Venison Cutlets
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Sear the venison cutlets quickly to the desired doneness, then remove and keep warm.
3. Mix together chopped herbs; coat each cutlet with sesame oil and herbs.
4. Add garlic, shallots, ginger, soy sauce, and chicken broth to the pan juices.
5. Simmer for about 8 minutes.
6. Swirl in butter and return to simmer.
7. Arrange venison slices on plates and spoon sauce over each.
8. Serve immediately.
